title: Quantity Surveyor (Tender)/Pre Sales Engineer
description:
Job Description & Requirements

  • Analyze project drawings, specifications, and tender documents to prepare accurate BOQs (Bill of Quantities) for ELV systems.
  • Prepare detailed cost estimates and competitive tender submissions in coordination with engineering and procurement teams.
  • Review and evaluate subcontractor/supplier quotations to ensure scope and price compliance.
  • Liaise with clients, consultants, and contractors for clarifications during the tendering phase.
  • Monitor project budgets, material requirements, and identify any financial or commercial risks.
  • Track market trends, cost data, and supplier prices for continuous improvement in estimating processes.
  • Coordinate with technical teams to ensure proposed solutions meet project and budget requirements.
  • Collaborate with technical support team to provide Technical Support & Bidding Support

Job Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Engineering or related qualifications
  • Minimum 2-3 years of experience in a similar field
  • Strong technical knowledge in Electronic Security - Card Access, CCTV, Integrated Security Management System (ISMS)
  • Minimum knowledge of Extra Low Voltage (ELV) such as IP Network Switches, Public Address, Intercom and other 3rd parties’ solutions
  • Proven experience in medium to large Security and ELV projects
  • Ability to design, size, and estimate various Security Related and ELV systems
  • Working knowledge of IP networking, Cyber Security solutions would be preferred

postedCompany.description:
RH SYNERGY (S) PTE. LTD.

Founded in 2006, RH Synergy is trading and solution integrator provider, providing expertises in fields of surveillance system, access control system, facility monitoring system, public address system, car park management system, automatic barrier system and customized IT application. Our main team of multi-disciplinary consultants consists of an elite group of experience in risk assessment and design of facilities security solution.

As your business demands changes, the system should adapt to meet those demands, instead of impeding your business. with our expertise, we can help you plan and implement a system that is flexible and adaptable to your growing business, while protecting your investment. with our motto "Invest with Peace of Mind", we wish to extend our knowledge and expertise in security solutions to our customers and potentials that there should never be a compromise to protect your assets and loved ones. By focusing on innovative application of technology, best practices and a dedicated team of experienced consultants and highly trained technical personnels, we adopted a partnership approach in designing the best of breed security solution to our customers.
